case_title: ERIC M NEWBERG VS. RECOLOGY GOLDEN GATE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ERIC M. NEWBERG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RECOLOGY GOLDEN GATE IS NOT PRESENT.
